behavioral_invariants.description: 15-stage LFSR using XNOR of bits 12 and 13 for White/Periodic noise (Standard TI).
16-stage LFSR used in Sega clones, resulting in 6.25% lower pitch for periodic noise.
Noise frequency can be slaved to the output of Tone Generator 3 for pitched noise effects.

variants.name: TI SN76494
variants.description: Low-clock version (500 kHz) with Audio In.

variants.name: TI SN76496
variants.description: Standard version with Audio In pin.
